extraVariables.prior_feedback:
1 previous patch accepted · 2 rejected by a human reviewer.

Most instructive verdicts:
- REJECTED tests/start.spec.ts (locator_drift): "Do NOT patch Get Started failures — the link renders as a disabled button because of PROD-4312, a known product bug. The tests are correctly catching it; a locator patch just hides the regression."
- REJECTED tests/nav.spec.ts (locator_drift): "Same PROD-4312 breakage — refuse these until the fix ships."

REJECTED notes are corrections from a human who saw a previous patch fail in this repo. Treat them as constraints — do not repeat those mistakes.
